$comment: All durable harness state, owned by the CLI (./AGENTS.sh) — never hand-edit. Keys: setup (present only while guided setup is pending; init drives it), commands (via `cmd set/rm`; verify = definition-of-done step, init = session-start check), features (via `feature ...`; max one in_progress, never delete — mark done), progress (via `log`; append-only, display bounded by the CLI), rules (via `docs add/rm`; curated project knowledge). Future harness versions may add top-level keys. Transient scratch lives in agents.scratch.json (gitignored).

check.run: python3 -m venv .venv && . .venv/bin/activate && pip install -r requirements.txt && python3 cad/violin.py && python3 mesh/mesher.py && python3 sim_struct/structural.py && python3 sim_acoustic/acoustic.py

test_visualize.run: . .venv/bin/activate && PYTHONPATH=scripts python3 cad/violin.py && python3 scripts/visualize.py violin_body.step my_test_vis.stl

progress.title: Install Elmer; real FEM for structural + acoustic
progress.done: Elmer 9.0 via elmer-csc PPA in install_sys_deps.sh. Struct: Elmer eigen now converges (Direct/UMFPACK solver + Coordinate Scaling 0.001 mm->m). Acoustic: Elmer scalar eigen segfaults in 9.0 build, so cavity modes solved via P1 tet FEM (common/cavity_fem.py) on new air-cavity mesh (violin_cavity.step/.msh). Sims default to real meshes; mass flows from CAD.

progress.title: Fuse violin body parts for free-free structural modes
progress.done: Made all 8 disconnected violin body pieces overlap slightly and combined them using BRepAlgoAPI_Fuse with fuzzy tolerance.

progress.title: Elmer 26.2.1 source build: scalar eigen still unusable
progress.done: Built Elmer release-26.2.1 from source -> /opt/elmer-26.2.1 (no GUI/MPI, OpenMP+Mumps, internal ARPACK/UMFPACK). Ran cube-cavity eigen matrix vs both installed PPA 26.2 and source 26.2.1; IDENTICAL results. Table: StressSolve vector eigen=OK(5 vals); Heat scalar eigen Steady=DNAUPD info=-9; Helmholtz scalar eigen Steady=DNAUPD info=-9; Heat eigen Transient=SEGFAULT add1stordertime. KEY: original AddEquationSolution/AddSolvers setup segfault is FIXED; remaining steady-state failure is zero mass(B) matrix (not assembled for scalar solvers), not version-specific. PPA pkg labelled 9.0 but binary is v26.2. Updated common/cavity_fem.py docstring with findings.
progress.blockers: Scalar Heat/Helmholtz eigen cannot produce eigenvalues: mass matrix unassembled in Steady state (DNAUPD -9); Transient eigen segfaults. Need custom mass-assembling solver or upstream fix before replacing Python cavity_fem fallback.
